% Unknown documentclass falls back to OmniBus.cls, which defines the RevTeX-style
% \begin{references} bibliography environment. This guards OmniBus's \references
% constructor: it must produce a FULL bibliography (xml:id, citestyle, and a
% <title>References</title> via begin_bibliography) like Perl — not the old stub
% that emitted a bare <bibliography> with auto-generated bibitem ids.
% Witnesses: cond-mat9805405, hep-ex0007011 (\documentstyle{revtex}).
\documentclass{zzz_unknown_class}
\begin{document}
Body text.
\begin{references}
\bibitem{ref1} A. Author, Some Title (2020).
\end{references}
\end{document}
